title: ETV News
desc: The host provides the latest information, advancements and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Subhamastu
desc: An expert astrologer offers astrological advice based on the zodiac signs and explains the planetary movements and their impact.

title: Sadguru Sai
desc: Religious leader preaches and sings, centered on Shirdi Sai Baba's teachings and virtues.

title: Jai Ganesha
desc: Shiva beheads Ganesha; Parvati urges resurrection. Ganesha becomes Vighnaharta, the obstacle remover.

title: Allari Ramudu
desc: This film, directed by Gopal B. and written by Gopalakrishna and Venkateswara Rao Paruchuri, features Achyuth, Aarti Agarwal, and Gajala in prominent roles.

title: Aaropranam
desc: Chandi joins medical college, falls for Akansha, who returns her feelings but hesitates due to their age difference.

title: Sandyaragam
desc: After losing her sister, Janaki guardians Maya, whose modern ways begin influencing Janaki's daughter, creating family challenges.

title: Rangula Ratnam
desc: Vishnu, greeting card company owner, loves Keerthi, but her overprotective nature causes tension in their relationship.

title: Vasundhara
desc: Vasundhara depicts sharecroppers' struggles against oppressors Haji and Rupchand, with protests, harassment, failed authority, and communal riots stirred by the villains.

title: Merupu Kalalu
desc: Priya wants to be a nun despite Thomas's admiration. Thomas enlists Deva's help to win her, but Priya ends up falling for Deva instead.

title: Veyi Subhamulu Kalugu Neeku
desc: Chaithu saves to buy his dream home for his father's oath but faces unexpected troubles that strain his relationship with his girlfriend.

title: Yashoda
desc: A desperate surrogate fosters her sister's surgery, discovers Eva's deadly deception, uncovering a linked murder plot amid greed, exploitation, and a shocking dark secret.

title: Jeevana Tarangalu
desc: Innocent Roja helps irresponsible Ananth but gets into trouble. His stepbrother Vijay then comes to her rescue.

title: Sridevi Drama Company
desc: Talented artists entertain viewers with funny skits, dangerous stunts, and popular tracks and dance performances.

title: Etv Taggedele
desc: ETV Taggedele is a Telugu show with celebrity performances, dance, comedy skits, and fun tasks delivering lively entertainment.

title: Janakiparinayam
desc: This is a fun collection of melodious songs sung by skilled artists for popular Telugu films. It brings melody, talent, and entertainment to fans everywhere today.

title: Andaala Rakshasi
desc: Gautham falls for Mithuna, who loves Surya. After an accident, Mithuna recovers but can't forget Surya. Love triangles and sacrifices unfold amid family drama.

title: Jhansi
desc: Orphaned law graduate Jhansi fights for justice after her sister's family faces tragedy. She battles her sister's in-laws, who refuse to accept their grandchildren, and wins custody as their guardian.

title: Ammoru
desc: The serial follows faithful people facing danger and injustice. When they pray, Goddess Ammoru appears to guide, protect, restore peace, teaching morals and inspiring faith.

title: Bommarillu
desc: Siddhu's protective father arranges his marriage, but Siddhu finds love with Hasini. A heartwarming tale of unexpected romance and new beginnings!

title: Manasantha Nuvve
desc: Childhood sweethearts separated, rich Anu seeks poor Chanti to rekindle love.

desc: A mixed-news bulletin which keeps viewers updated with the current affairs.

title: Dhee
desc: Children showcase dance prowess in a reality show. Twelve teams compete for top honors.
